name: Baked Cheese Grits (Lagasse)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups yellow grits (not quick or instant)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Prepare grits according to package directions.
3. In a large bowl, add butter, salt, black pepper, garlic, and grated cheese. Mix until butter and cheese melt.
4. Beat together eggs and milk in a small bowl. Stir into the melted butter mixture until combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a square 8-by-2-inch baking dish.
6. Bake for about 1 hour, or until the top sets. Serve immediately.
